SHORT NAME: DTRY_NTRTNL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: DTRY_NTRTNL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
132700000X: Dietary manager 
133N00000X: Nutritionist 
133NN1002X: Nutritionist — nutrition, education 
133V00000X: Dietitian, registered 
133VN1004X: Dietitian, registered
